final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] invalid_memory;

    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            invalid_memory <= data_in; // Write data to invalid_memory
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= invalid_memory; // Read data from invalid_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
